positive: Minimalist abstract composition featuring interlocking geometric shapes (circles, triangles, arches) in a limited palette of terracotta, cream, and slate gray. The design emphasizes negative space and clean, modern lines. Bauhaus inspired, flat vector art, conceptual, elegant.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, clutter, gradients, excessive detail
